---
title: Rome, Fontaine aux Quatre Fleuves
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557456/romefontaine4fleuves_20211127_vtk7gp.png
description: Rome, Fontaine aux Quatre Fleuves
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/11/27
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557456/romefontaine4fleuves_20211127_vtk7gp.png)
